calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-29-2004 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Sep-16-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: J. Leathley.
David J. Cook, Esq. for Plaintiff: State Bar of California, a public corporation.
After hearing the evidence presented and declaration of Tracy McCormick, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: Charles B. Sapper for the principal sum of $39,297.45
Judgment signed in open court.
